name: Morning Run Mix
description: 5:45 AM out the door. High energy, no gaps. SZA leads, Hozier closes.

name: Long Run Saturday
description: 10+ miles. Starts easy, builds. This playlist has to last.

name: Sunday Chill
description: Coffee, couch, Derek doing the crossword. Soft folk and R&B.

name: House Cooking
description: Cooking dinner after clinic. Nothing too demanding.

name: Strength Day
description: Gym days. Needs a beat. Fleetwood and Zeppelin earn their spot here.

name: Road Trip with Derek
description: Columbus to Cleveland and back. Collaborative - Derek adds country, I remove it.

name: Women's Run Power
description: For the monthly Women Run Columbus group. Shared with the crew.

name: Maintenance Phase Queue
description: Podcast backlog. Michaela and Aubrey doing the work.

name: Ali on the Run Episodes
description: Running podcast. I listen on recovery days.

name: The Daily - Saved Episodes
description: Morning commute to Kestrel in Worthington. 20 minutes is just right.

name: Clinic Waiting Room
description: Calm background for the peds PT waiting area. No surprise drops.

name: Indie Folk Deep Cuts
description: Fleet Foxes, Gregory Alan Isakov, Bon Iver deep cuts. Not the singles.

name: Classic Rock Drives
description: When the windows are down on 315. Led Zeppelin, Fleetwood, Amos Lee.

name: R&B Vibes
description: SZA and H.E.R. rotation. Gets me through notes on Friday evenings.

name: Rainy Day Recovery
description: Active recovery miles in the rain. Something melancholy and beautiful.

name: New Finds
description: Things I discovered this month. Audition playlist before they earn a permanent home.

name: Columbus Marathon 2024 Training
description: 18-week training soundtrack. Archived but can't delete it.

name: Peds PT - Movement Songs
description: Songs I use with kids for movement activities. Upbeat, friendly, singable.

name: Gracie Abrams Loop
description: Currently obsessed. The Secret of Us on repeat since June.

name: Liked Songs Overflow
description: Everything I keep saving. The catch-all.

name: Noah Kahan - Full Rotation
description: Stick Season album plus deep cuts. Gets me through long drives to Cincinnati.
